case_title: US FOODS, INC. VS. SHARIF WAGDY MOBASHER

docket_entries.description: MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR PUBLICATION OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT
